title: Azna

{{Quote|The Promenade is one of the shorter races, consisting of only four legs: Dahvil to Ord Dorlass; Ord Dorlass to Tintel; Tintel to Azna; and Azna to Fodro.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Azna''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it served as a stopping point in the popular [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] race known as the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]], and the event drew many spectators there despite the racing being illegal in the [[Azna system/Legends|Azna system]]. As part of one such event, [[Racer/Legends|racer]] and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent [[Siro Simito]] and his rival [[Seeg]] both visited Azna, where the former punched the latter in the face.

==Description==
{{Quote|Luckily, this delivery is to Fait d'Fait, a system not far off the Tintel to Azna hyperspace route.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Azna was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Azna system/Legends|Azna system]], a part of the [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on a [[Tintel–Azna hyperspace route|hyperlane]] that connected it to the celestial body [[Tintel]]<ref name="CRO" /> of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and lay at a distance of no more than one [[Standard day/Legends|day's]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and at least two days' travel from<ref name="CRO" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="EAOC" /> astronomical object [[Fait d'Fait]] and<ref name="CRO" /> the Outer Rim<ref name="EAOC" /> planet<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|284|Fodro}}</ref> [[Fodro]], respectively.<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
{{Quote|The crowd at the finish line on Azna is huge, especially considering the fact that the races are illegal in this system, and the racers are just going to stop here, power up and resupply, then leave as soon as possible.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Azna served as the last of three mid-race stopping points of the popular<ref name="CRO" /> [[Standard year/Legends|annual]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Star Rally]] [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] racing route known as the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]]—despite the fact that the races were illegal in the Azna [[Star system/Legends|system]] by that [[Time/Legends|time]]. Due to those circumstances, the [[Racer/Legends|racers]] would only stop at Azna to power up and resupply their [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and then depart as expeditiously as possible.<ref name="CRO" />

[[File:Siro_Simito.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The pilot Siro Simito visited Azna as part of the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade race.]]
At one point, the racer and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Siro Simito]] was tasked by the Alliance to deliver a data module from<ref name="CRO" /> the Outer Rim Territories<ref name="EAOC" /> celestial body [[Dahvil]] to a contact on Fait d'Fait while participating in the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade. Simito intentionally decreased the hyperdrive efficiency of his [[Axe (starship)|starship]] on the first legs of the race's route so that he would not later make a suspicious delay on the segment of the route where the racer planned to make a detour to Fait d'Fait from the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting Azna and Tintel. During Simito's visit to Fait d'Fait, the other racers headed straight to Azna, with the warehouse owner [[Gevil Flan]] on the former celestial body also being aware of that being the route Simito was supposedly taking.<ref name="CRO" />

On Azna, despite the illegality of the Star Rally races, a huge crowd assembled at the finish line. Simito's rival, [[Seeg]], beat him to the planet by two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], although Seeg then became stuck on Azna while his ship's malfunctioning hyperdrive was being repaired. When Simito's [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|ship]] was ready to the point of only needing to be [[Fuel/Legends|refueled]] before departure, the racer decided to indulge his feud with his competitor. He went up to where Seeg was talking to a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] next to the Star Rally promoter [[Pann Tefilous]] and, after a short exchange of taunts, punched Seeg in the face. Afterward, Simito departed the scene, holding his signature [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-axe]] overhead and cheered on by the crowd, and later Seeg and Simito both left Azna to travel to Fodro. At some point by the time that shortly followed the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Rebel Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] included Simito's report, which mentioned the racer's visit to Azna during the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade, in a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Azna was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Azna system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square P-6.<ref name="TEA" />
